results.evidence: States 'Patient is in a malaria-endemic area' under the Malaria section, and location is identified as Siaya County, western Kenya.

results.description: IPTp-SP first dose recommended (GA 22 weeks, eligible since >13 weeks)
results.evidence: States 'She should receive intermittent preventive treatment with sulfadoxine-pyrimethamine (SP)' and 'This is her first eligible visit for IPTp since she was only 10 weeks at booking. Administer SP today.'

results.description: IPTp-SP specified as directly observed therapy (DOT) at the clinic
results.evidence: The note says to 'Administer sulfadoxine-pyrimethamine (IPTp) — first dose today' but does NOT specify DOT administration or that the patient should take the tablets at the clinic under observation.

results.description: Correct dose mentioned: sulfadoxine 500mg / pyrimethamine 25mg as single dose
results.evidence: The note refers only to 'sulfadoxine-pyrimethamine (SP)' and 'sulfadoxine-pyrimethamine (IPTp)' without specifying the per-tablet dose (500mg/25mg), the number of tablets (3), or the total dose.

results.description: ITN use reinforced (already provided at first contact)
results.evidence: States 'She should also continue sleeping under her insecticide-treated bed net every night — counsel her about the importance of consistent use even on warm nights.' Also listed under counseling.
States 'Hemoglobin of 10.2 g/dL indicates mild anemia.' However, does not explicitly state the 10.0-10.9 range classification.

results.description: Standard iron supplementation (30-60mg daily, not therapeutic dose)
results.evidence: States 'Continue iron 60 mg and folic acid 0.4 mg daily' — this is the standard dose, not the therapeutic 120 mg dose. However, no explicit reasoning about why therapeutic dose is not needed.

results.description: Next IPTp-SP dose scheduled at Contact 3 (26 weeks), >=1 month apart
results.evidence: States 'Second dose of IPTp-SP will be due at next visit' and 'Next visit at approximately 26 weeks' but does not specify the >=1 month spacing requirement or frame it as 'Contact 3'.
